_publications._publicationTitle: p21-Activated kinases are required for transformation in a cell-based model of neurofibromatosis type 2.

_contextSnippet: only very small tumors were noted after 6 weeks (compare Fig. 4 with Fig. 5), but, as with the ΔBB xenograft, these masses were larger in cells expressing PID LF
details: NIH-3T3 cells without ΔBB transgene developed only very small tumors after 6 weeks, but masses were larger in cells expressing PID LF
